rulings.Case Title: CAN HONG VS. ROBERTO VATTUONE ST. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 19, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANTS REINA VATTUONE SR., REINA VATTUONE JR., ROBERTO VATTUONE SR and ROBERT VAATTUONE JR.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to (1) reconcile allegations in paragraphs 6f(2) and 7(a)(1)-(6) and (2) 7(b) and 8a(3). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
